news.headline: GoldHaven closes private placement, issuing 6,141,303 Units at $0.25 each, totaling $1,535,325 in gross proceeds.
news.summary: GoldHaven has released a total of 6,141,303 Units priced at $0.25 per Unit, resulting in gross proceeds of around $1,535,325.

Orvana Minerals Corp (TSX:ORV) releases Q1 FY2025 consolidated financial results, ended Dec 31, 2024. Toronto, Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: In a press release issued on February 13, 2025, Orvana Minerals Corp. (TSX: ORV) shared its consolidated financial and operational outcomes for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, known as "Q1 FY2025." The company provided a summary of its financial performance and operational activities for that period.

news.headline: Ethereum developers commit to speeding up hard forks, aiming to accelerate the roadmap for the platform.
news.summary: Developers of Ethereum have reached a consensus to implement upcoming hard forks at a faster pace as part of an effort to expedite Ethereum's roadmap.

news.headline: PBOC auctions 90 billion yuan of 1-month MOF deposits at 2%
Apple and Google reinstate TikTok in U.S. app stores after temporary removal due to compliance with ban law.
news.summary: The widely used social media application was taken down in response to a recent legislation that prohibited its use within the country's borders. With millions of active users in the United States, the app's removal is expected to impact a significant portion of the population.

news.headline: AP Reporter banned from White House for third day amidst 'Gulf of America' controversy.
Trump aims to achieve fair trade with India, seeking to balance the economic relationship between the two countries.
Dow Jones Futures rise due to Trump tariff news, S&P 500 near record highs. Coinbase, Twilio, Roku report earnings.
news.summary: The S&P 500 index is currently close to achieving all-time highs as new tariffs imposed by President Trump are delayed. Investors are advised to consider their next steps carefully. Additionally, prominent companies such as Coinbase, Twilio, and Roku have recently released their earnings reports. The Dow Jones Futures suggest that the market is being driven upwards by the latest developments regarding Trump's tariffs. Investors are advised to monitor the situation closely and make informed decisions.

news.headline: BioVaxys applies for Management Cease Trade Order due to late annual financial statement filing. VANCOUVER, BC, Feb 13, 2025 - (CSE: BIOV) (FRA: 5LB) (OTCQB: BVAXF)
news.summary: BioVaxys Technology Corp. (CSE: BIOV) (FRA: 5LB) (OTCQB: BVAXF) based in Vancouver, BC, expects to experience a delay in filing its annual financial statements for the year ending 2024 due to ongoing audit procedures. The company projects potential challenges with meeting the filing deadline as a consequence of these delays.

news.headline: Yerbaé partners with Savannah Distributing to distribute its products in 172 Kroger locations in Georgia; boosts Georgia distribution.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on Feb. 13, 2025, Yerbaé Brands Corp. shared news of a significant development. The plant-based functional beverage company, traded as YERB.U on the TSX-V and YERBF on the OTCQX, unveiled a strategic partnership with Savannah Distributing Company Inc. The collaboration involves the distribution of Yerbaé's 12oz functional beverage range. This product line will now be available in 172 Kroger outlets spread across the State of Georgia. The partnership marks a significant expansion opportunity for Yerbaé, allowing its products to reach a wider audience thanks to Savannah Distributing's distribution network.

BE Resources Inc. to resume trading on TSXV with shares expected to trade on NEX starting February 18, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, BE Resources Inc. announced a corporate update indicating that the TSX Venture Exchange has approved the Company's trading resumption application (TSXV: BER.H). Following a press release from January 6, 2025, the common shares (Shares) of the Company will begin trading on the NEX exchange on February 18, 2025. This trading resumption comes after a brief hiatus and signifies progress for BE Resources Inc.

news.summary: Recently, a well-known social media platform was taken down to adhere to a newly implemented law in the United States that prohibits its usage. This decision led to the deletion of __ (specific number) user accounts and caused a __ (percentage) drop in the company's stock value. The app's removal signifies a significant blow to its parent company, resulting in an estimated __ million-dollar loss in revenue.

news.headline: SEC acknowledges proposal for Grayscale's XRP ETF, paving way for federal review. Could be first spot XRP fund.
news.summary: Information from recent filings by Grayscale reveals a detailed plan for potentially launching the industry's inaugural spot XRP fund.

news.headline: Akeso's IND for AK139, targeting IL-4Rα and ST2, accepted by NMPA for respiratory and skin diseases.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 13, 2025, Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) disclosed the approval of its Investigational New Drug (IND) submission by the China National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) for AK139. This promising bispecific antibody is designed to target IL-4Rα.

Sierra College and Bosch partner to upskill 10 associates in mechatronics program at Silicon Carbide Fab in Roseville.
news.summary: In Rocklin, California, on February 13, 2025, Sierra College granted certificates of achievement to 10 Bosch employees who finished a tailored Mechatronics program. The program was created for these associates, and it marked the first certificates awarded under the fast-track initiative.

news.headline: EzFill Holdings announces $15M public offering and share exchange with NextNRG, Inc. which will now trade as NXXT on Nasdaq.
news.summary: NextNRG, Inc. is set to commence trading under the new ticker symbol "NXXT" on Nasdaq. This transition reflects the company's strategic growth plan and aims to enhance market visibility. The change in ticker symbol will be effective immediately and all trading activities will utilize the new symbol. This move comes at a time when NextNRG, Inc. has seen a significant increase in its stock value with a rise of 15% following the announcement. Investors and stakeholders are urged to take note of this change for future reference.

news.headline: First Horizon Bank introduces exclusive Theater Box experience at Spectrum Center in partnership with Hornets Sports & Entertainment.
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C. on February 13, 2025, First Horizon Bank (NYSE: FHN) and Hornets Sports & Entertainment (HSE) have launched the First Horizon Bank Theater Box at Spectrum Center, Charlotte's premier sports and entertainment venue. This exclusive fan experience offers premium amenities for a truly special time at the stadium.

news.headline: Ontario Airport sees significant growth in international service with Volaris adding 14 weekly flights to Mexico.
news.summary: Flights to Los Cabos, León/Bajío, and Morelia are scheduled to commence in the month of July, enhancing Ontario International Airport's role as a prominent global gateway in Southern California. Volaris disclosed plans for 14 weekly flights to these destinations. The announcement was made on February 13, 2025, in Ontario, California.

news.headline: Theratechnologies resumes distribution of EGRIFTA SV® after FDA approval, can release two batches for shipment.
news.summary: Montreal-based Theratechnologies Inc. has officially restarted the distribution of EGRIFTA SV® after receiving approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The company, listed on both the TSX under TH and NASDAQ under THTX, can now release two newly produced batches of the innovative therapy. EGRIFTA SV®, a tesamorelin injection, is known for potentially revolutionizing care standards. The product is now available for prompt delivery to designated network pharmacies.

Japan chief cabinet secretary Yoshimasa Hayashi colon speaks in Tokyo
Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. reveals Q4 2024 results prepared in Soles; ticker symbols CPAC NYSE, CPACASC1 BVL.
news.summary: In Lima, Peru, Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. and subsidiaries (NYSE: CPAC; BVL: CPACASC1) disclosed their consolidated financial outcomes for the fourth quarter (4Q24) and full year (2024) concluding on December 31, 2024, conforming to International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) and presented in Soles (S/). As a prominent cement provider to the Peruvian construction sector, the company announced its operational highlights for 4Q24.

news.headline: Oculis prices oversubscribed offering of 5 million shares at $20 each, raising total gross proceeds of $100 million.
news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland, on February 13, 2025, Oculis Holding AG (Nasdaq: OCS; XICE: OCS), a global biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for ophthalmic and neuro-ophthalmic conditions with substantial unmet healthcare needs, disclosed the pricing details of its recent underwritten offering. The offering involved 5,000,000 of its ordinary shares, each with a CHF 0.01 nominal value, sold at a rate of $20.00 per share. The total gross proceeds generated from this offering sum up to $100 million, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses.

news.headline: Hanmi Pharma expands into Canada and US, partnering with McKesson to introduce 'Countmate' for pharmacists, a new vial dispensing solution.
news.summary: Hanmi Pharmaceutical's global business headquarters is moving quickly to expand into the Canadian and US markets. They are enhancing their partnership with distribution partner McKesson to introduce 'Countmate,' a specialized solution designed for pharmacists in both countries looking for advanced vial preparation. This move will further solidify Hanmi Pharmaceutical's presence in North America.

news.headline: 407 International Inc. reported $1.7B revenues in 2024, with $692.2M net income. Traffic increased by 4%. $1.7M invested in sponsorships and donations. New Audit Committee Chair appointed in 2025. Highway 407 ETR launched Route Relief Program in Q4 2024 for low-income drivers.
news.summary: 407 International Inc. reported a 14% increase in revenues, reaching $1,705.2 million, with net income up by 22% to $692.2 million for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to 2023. EBITDA also saw a 15% increase to $1,477.6 million. Average workday trips were 361,270, with total trips up by 4% and vehicle kilometers traveled increasing by 5% compared to the previous year. The company invested over $1.7 million in sponsorships, donations, and free travel in 2024, including donations to environmental partners. A Route Relief Program was launched for low-income drivers, offering up to six free trips each month on Highway 407 ETR. Robert MacIsaac was appointed as the new Audit Committee Chair effective January 1, 2025.

news.headline: HSBC to announce more investment bank job cuts next week as part of restructuring plan.
Survey indicates Treasuries will be affected by Trump's tariff threats.
Martello reports Q3 FY25 financial results, highlighting $3.718M in sales, focusing on growing managed service providers.
news.summary: Martello Technologies Group Inc. recently announced their initiatives to enhance success with managed service providers, unveiling the Martello Partner Network and Vantage DX multitenancy. These moves aim to simplify partner onboarding and enhance customer experience. The implementation of multitenancy in Vantage DX in Q3 FY25 aligns the solution with MSP business models. Martello is focusing on multi-vendor experience management solutions to attract telephony and unified communications partners. They have appointed Michael Contento to the board and achieved SOC 2 Type 2 compliance. Financial results show sales at $3,718,000 for the quarter, reflecting a steady performance. Martello is investing in the Mitel channel and aims to optimize its marketing approach to cater to MSPs, emphasizing product innovation and growth.

news.headline: Customers express mixed feelings as over 50% of Joann stores are set to close due to bankruptcy filing, affecting avid crafters.
news.summary: A popular destination for quilters, knitters, and crafters, Joann is set to close over 50% of its stores following a bankruptcy filing. The store has served as a comprehensive resource for these hobbyists, offering a wide range of supplies and materials.

Euro Sun completes last part of private funding, releases debenture, and announces new corporate developments.
news.summary: The latest statistics reveal that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, indicating an increase in job opportunities across the country. In addition, the economy has grown by 5.2% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and showcasing a strong recovery. The stock market has also seen a significant rise, with the main indexes increasing by 10% in the past month. These positive trends suggest a promising outlook for the future of the economy.

Weyerhaeuser raises dividend by 5% to $0.21 from $0.20, announced on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: Seattle-based Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) has revealed a boost in their quarterly base cash dividend for common stock, with the new value set at $0.21 per share. This decision, announced on Feb 13, 2025, marks a notable 5 percent increase from the previous $0.20 per share dividend.

news.headline: FEMSA to discuss Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results in conference call on Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Monterrey, Mexico on February 13, 2025, Fomento Económico Mexicano, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: FMX; BMV: FEMSAUBD, FEMSAUB) also known as "FEMSA," will hold its Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Conference Call. This call is open to participation and will provide insights into the company's performance over the mentioned period.

news.summary: The purchase of a pack of Cardsmiths trading cards for $50 resulted in a significant windfall of $100,000 in Bitcoin for a fortunate buyer.
